title: [All About That Lace, Workroom]
description: Ceiling-high shelves line the lace-covered walls of the workroom, the fine-grained containers filled with folded articles of clothing, the garments also draped across several mannequins nestled in each corner.  A multi-tiered display of metal and wood stands at the center of the room, filled with various baubles caged in bowls of colorful blown glass.  Lengths of jewel-toned fabric are suspended above the display, the swathes wrapped with mixed metal chains and strips of oiled leather.
